zh.Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾分南
zh.Branxton, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Campbell於1295年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，她的父親Gillespic Campbell29歲，母親Elizabeth Stewart20歲。她於1318年之前與John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1350年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾考瓦爾。

zh-hans.Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾分南
zh-hans.Branxton, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Campbell于1295年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，她的父亲Gillespic Campbell29岁，母亲Elizabeth Stewart20岁。她于1318年之前与John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1350年在苏格兰阿吉爾享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾考瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Campbell was born in 1295, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Gillespic Campbell, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Stewart, was 20. She married John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont before 1318, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1350, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 55, and was buried in Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Campbell est née en 1295, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Gillespic Campbell, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stewart, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont avant 1318, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1350, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Cowal, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Campbell 1295 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gillespic Campbell 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Stewart 20. Sie hat vor 1318 in Argyll, Scotland John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1350 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Cowal, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Campbell è nata il nel 1295 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Gillespic Campbell, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Stewart, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont prima del 1318, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1350, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Campbellが1295年にスコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Gillespic Campbellは29歳，母Elizabeth Stewartは20歳であった。1318年以前にスコットランドアルグイルでJohn Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1350年にスコットランドアルグイルで55歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルコワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Campbell(이)가 1295년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gillespic Campbell(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stewart(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1318년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이에서 John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1350년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 코월에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Campbell nasceu em 1295, em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Gillespic Campbell, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stewart, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont antes 1318, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1350, em Argyll, Scotland, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Campbell родилась в 1295 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Gillespic Campbell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stewart, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont перед 1318 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1350 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности коуаль, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Campbell nació en 1295, en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Gillespic Campbell, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stewart, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont antes de 1318, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1350, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Cowal, Argyll, Scotland.
